content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line bending right, and the car appears well-positioned on the track heading into this right curve.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 23, target = (23 + 5) % 121 = 28
- Target waypoint 28: (7.0997, 1.1461)
- Car: x=6.4327, y=0.7352, heading=11.980°
- dy = 1.1461 - 0.7352 = 0.4109
- dx = 7.0997 - 6.4327 = 0.6670
- bearing = atan2(0.4109, 0.6670) = 31.62°
- delta = 31.62° - 11.980° = 19.64°
- |delta| ≈ 20° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but target waypoint 28 is still to the left of current heading (delta=+19.6°), so continue with 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line into the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight heading due east (~0-5° heading)",
    "Sharp right curve begins around waypoints 26-32 (x=6.9-7.3, y=0.9-1.7)",
    "After the right curve, track goes west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is nearly centered (~0.026m from center) — excellent position",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on straights; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Need to prepare for right turn (negative steering) starting around WP30-35",
    "Heading is ~12° and rising — car is turning left slightly to follow waypoints",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.200, 6.242, 6.317, 6.380, 6.433],
    "y": [0.670, 0.677, 0.695, 0.710, 0.735],
    "yaw": [4.100, 5.269, 7.124, 9.500, 11.980]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP28 at (7.100, 1.146): dy=0.411, dx=0.667, bearing=31.62°, delta=+19.64° → moderate left correction",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
